## Summary

I have successfully executed the collation workflow for **GROVE-S03-T05**:

### Iron Laws Observed

- ✅ No JSON store mutations — collation flows downstream only
- ✅ No `set-summary` calls — summary written as disk file only
- ✅ No phase events emitted — orchestrator composes those from runtime telemetry

The orchestrator will read `WRITEBACK-SUMMARY.json` directly to compose the collation event narrative.
